violations.description: Plumbing system. — --Plumbing system was not designed, constructed, operated and/or maintained according to regulation. Plumbing system was not designed, constructed, operated and/or maintained according to regulation. Pan found under the handwashing sink drain for catching drips and leaks. Also, observed water sitting on the floor along the wall between the hand sink and 3 compartment sink. Plumbing should be properly maintained.

Cleaning and maintenance of floors, walls and ceilings. — --Physical facilities (e.g. floors, walls, ceiling etc…) were not maintained in good repair. Wall with the hand washing sink and 3 compartment sink was found buckled just above the tile baseboards. Multiple tiles also found missing along the baseboard throughout the kitchen.
Design, construction, clean, maintained (1 pt deducted)
Design, construction, clean, maintained (1 pt deducted)
Date marking accomplished, discarded (2 pts deducted)
Design, installation, clean, and maintained (1 pt deducted)
Cleaning frequency, maintained clean (1 pt deducted)
